input.initialPrompt: I want to run only the tests with the Category=Integration trait in this xUnit project.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run only tests with the Category=Integration trait in their xUnit project. Let me first look at the project files to understand the setup.

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-f8f54302151245e7bd75f59ac79c65e3 && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-restore 2>&1 | tail -20", "description": "Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait", "initial_wait": 30}

toolArgs.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests with verbose output

data.reasoningText: The output is empty except for exit code 0. Let me run it again with more verbose output to see what happened.

toolCalls.name: bash
